patterns_discovered.description: Creation of multiple interconnected documentation files covering all aspects of authentication system
patterns_discovered.evidence: 7 documentation files created covering architecture, error handling, integration, session management, token refresh flow, and troubleshooting

patterns_discovered.description: Detailed documentation following clean architecture principles with clear separation of concerns
patterns_discovered.evidence: ARCHITECTURE.md shows 4-layer structure: Presentation, Domain, Infrastructure, and Core layers with clear dependencies

patterns_discovered.description: Use of ASCII diagrams and flowcharts to explain complex authentication flows
patterns_discovered.evidence: ASCII art diagrams showing data flow, authentication flow, and token refresh flow in ARCHITECTURE.md

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of markdown headers with table of contents for navigation
patterns_discovered.evidence: All documentation files follow consistent structure with TOC, sections, and proper markdown formatting

patterns_discovered.description: Systematic marking of completed tasks in implementation plan
patterns_discovered.evidence: implementation_plan.json updated to mark task 6.3 as completed with specific commit hash

gotchas_discovered.issue: Large file content truncation in git diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Limited visibility of content in ERROR_HANDLING.md and other documentation files
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Diff shows '... (truncated, 114525 chars total)' indicating content was cut off

gotchas_discovered.impact: ASCII diagrams may become difficult to maintain as system evolves
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Large ASCII art architecture diagram in ARCHITECTURE.md with detailed layer structure

approach_outcome.approach: Comprehensive documentation suite creation using markdown files with visual diagrams and structured content
approach_outcome.efficiency: High - Created 7 documentation files covering all required aspects in single session
approach_outcome.quality: High - Visual diagrams, clear architecture explanations, and comprehensive coverage
approach_outcome.scalability: Good - Modular documentation structure allows for easy updates and additions

recommendations.description: Consider automating documentation generation from source code to ensure consistency
Review truncated documentation files to ensure complete content coverage
Consider adding documentation build verification to ensure all links and references work correctly
Evaluate if interactive documentation tools would enhance developer experience
